login.title: Sign in
login.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Sign in now.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Unlock every TGE Academy course — free, in minutes.
register.sentBody: If {email} isn’t already registered, we’ve sent a verification link. Click it to activate your account.

verifyEmail.expiredBody: This verification link has expired or been used already. Request a new one.
verifyEmail.invalidBody: We couldn’t verify that link. It may have been used already or typed incorrectly.

resendVerification.title: Resend verification
resendVerification.intro: Enter your email. If an unverified account exists, we’ll send a fresh link.
resendVerification.sent: If an unverified account exists with that email, we’ve sent a fresh link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email. We’ll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists with that email, we’ve sent you a reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.intro: Enter your new password (at least 12 characters).
resetPassword.invalid: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.

acceptInvite.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvite.subtitle: Set up your account to start the course
acceptInvite.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired

dashboard.title: Your courses
dashboard.empty: You don't have access to any courses yet. Contact your administrator.
dashboard.emptyIntro: You're not enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.unenrollConfirm: Remove “{title}” from your list? The course stays available in the catalog.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Public courses open to anyone with an Academy account. No separate enrollment needed.
catalog.empty: No public courses are available right now. Check back soon.

course.enrollFailed: Enrollment failed. Please try again in a moment.

lesson.translationPending: This lesson hasn't been translated into your preferred language yet — showing it in the original language.

account.title: My account
account.verificationBody: You still need to confirm your email address. Didn’t get the link?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
